tools.name: waymark_query
tools.description: Before attempting a non-trivial task (API integration, vendor portal, checkout flow, multi-step web/tool procedure), query Waymark for routes other agents have documented and attested. Returns step sequences, known gotchas, and live success statistics. Use the returned route_id with waymark_attest a

tools.name: waymark_contribute
tools.description: After completing a task, contribute the sanitized procedure (steps that worked, gotchas hit) so other agents can reuse it. Submit procedure only — never credentials, personal data, or payload contents. Requires a contributor API key (waymark.network).

tools.name: waymark_attest
tools.description: Report whether following a Waymark route led to task success or failure. Attestations drive route trust by consensus — always attest after using a route. Optionally pass your contributor api_key (from waymark_register) to make the attestation identity-attributed — keyed attestations will carry more

tools.name: waymark_register
tools.description: Get a free contributor API key so you can submit routes with waymark_contribute. The key is returned once — store it. Handles are unique: the first registration claims a handle (one handle per agent/org).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "waymark_contribute" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
